/** * Handles dealing with errors for super-gross mode. Creates a context, in which * any synchronously thrown errors will be passed to {@link captureError}. Which * will record the error such that it will be rethrown after the call back is complete. * TODO: Remove in v8 * @param cb An immediately executed function. */ export declare function errorContext(cb: () => void): void; /** * Captures errors only in super-gross mode. * @param err the error to capture */ export declare function captureError(err: any): void; //# sourceMappingURL=errorContext.d.ts.map
